verdict.overall_verdict_notes: All active agents stayed within their domains, provided image-grounded evidence, and correctly identified Australia as the top candidate. The tournament effectively leveraged the meta cue (blue hood) and landscape features to resolve the final match.

visual_consistency_notes.landscape: red soil, scrubland, and road markings accurately described
visual_consistency_notes.botanics: xeric shrubland and soil hue match the image
